name: @mog/xlsx-parser-wasm
description: Rust WASM XLSX parser — pure Rust crate, build scripts only

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:dev: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --dev && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:bundler: wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.build:nodejs: wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg --release && cp scripts/pkg-gitignore-template pkg/.gitignore
scripts.gate:ooxml-contract: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- ooxml-contract
scripts.gate:package-graph: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- package-graph
scripts.gate:l2-contract: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- l2-contract
scripts.gate:corpus-smoke: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-smoke
scripts.gate:corpus-anti-cheat: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-anti-cheat
scripts.gate:corpus-golden: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-golden
scripts.gate:perf-smoke: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-smoke
scripts.gate:perf-golden: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-golden
scripts.gate:corpus-full: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- corpus-full
scripts.gate:perf-full: cargo run -p xlsx-parser --bin xlsx-gate --features cli -- perf-full
scripts.corpus:crashtest: sh -c 'test -n "$MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR" || { echo "Set MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR to the XLSX corpus directory" >&2; exit 1; }; cargo run --profile crashtest --bin xlsx-crashtest --features cli -- "$MOG_XLSX_CORPUS_DIR"'
